en: I feel like this last batch of songs were some of my best. A record deal could change everything.
ko: I feel like this last batch of songs were some of my best. A record deal could change everything.

en: Maybe I'd settle down, digging some roots. Find me a farmhouse, find me you.
ja: 多分定住して根を下ろすだろう
zhTW: 也許我會安頓下來，扎下根
vi: Có lẽ tôi sẽ ổn định, đâm rễ

en: Maybe I wouldn't be already gone again, if it weren't for the wind.
ja: 多分また去ることはなかったかも
zhTW: 也許我不會又已經離開了
vi: Có lẽ tôi sẽ không lại ra đi

en: I wouldn't stay wondering what's out there. I wouldn't saddle up on the breeze.
ko: 밖에 무엇이 있는지 궁금해하지 않을 거야.
ja: 外に何があるか気にならなかっただろう
zhTW: 我不會一直想著外面有什麼
vi: Tôi sẽ không tự hỏi ngoài kia có gì

en: I wouldn't disappear out of thin air. I could put down these wings.
ja: 薄い空気の中に消えることもなかっただろう
vi: Tôi sẽ không biến mất vào hư không
